sample_description: To complete Exterior Alterations (replace rooftop MUA's & roof membrane) and construct Interior Alterations (upgrade telecom rooms 2 - 9 floors, & telecom/elevator room on 13th floor) in an existing apartment building (MacEwan Residence building).  - MacEwan University

To construct Interior Alterations in Two stand-alone residential apartment buildings, including Elevator and Fire Alarm System upgrade and limitations. Elevator improvements: Upgrade of Firefighters' Emergency Operation, elevator recall, controllers and operating fixtures. Fire Alarm; Replace existing Fire Alarm Control Panel with new addressable f.a.c.p.. Replace existing f.a. initiating devices with new addressable models.  Re-connect existing f.a. notification circuits to the new f.a. panel. Buildings, 1112 Hermitage Rd  & 1122 Hermitage Rd - Christopher County.
To construct exterior alterations (maintenance) (parkade access ramp) to an existing Apartment Building (Riverview Towers).

To construct interior alterations to an existing mixed use high rise building (landlord work to remove 4th floor elevator lobby partitions and subdivde the office space with a new demising wall)  Icon Tower - Phase 2.

To construct interior alterations (Kitchen renoation, including doorway widening of 2 entrances on non-weight bearing walls; existing half bath renovation, reconfiguration of master bedroom doorways and ensuite closets. Hallway closet space relocated within hallway. Existing electrical and plumbing will be used. Repositioning of 2 toilets. New ceiling light fixtures to existing wiring. Exterior doors will be updated, but same size of openning., NOT to be used as an additional Dwelling).
To construct a Semi-Detached House with 2 secondary suite(s), Unenclosed Front Porches and Ramps on each side.
To complete Interior Alterations (Elevator electrical modifications) to an existing apartment building - The Riverwind (Tower "A") NOTE: see BP 421856906-004 for Tower "B"
To Construct interior alterations to 2 apartment Bldgs- new guards and handrails to conform to code as directed by Health Dept.
To construct interior alterations to upgrade a fire alarm and modernize the elevators - Hollyburn Tower.
To construct an uncovered deck (Wheel chair ramp 1.84m x 1.84m @ 0.91m in Height).

To change a general retail use (main floor) to residential apartment  use and to construct interior/exterior alterations, adding 7 new residential suites each separately accessible at grade, existing 5 story apartment house.
To construct Exterior Alterations (ramp) to an existing building. “Cabrini Centre”
To construct an addition and exterior alterations to an existing Apartment Building (Building C) 4 storey elevator and lobby addition.
To construct exterior alterations at a residential row house site (repair balconies, concrete handrails, cracked caulking) - West Edmonton Village.
To construct side uncovered decks with an accessibility ramp to a Mobile House (overall size, 12.19m x 7.13m).
To construct a Wheel chair ramp. ( 6.09m x 2.43m @ 0.61m high)
To construct a wheelchair ramp (1.22 m x 14.63 m).
To construct exterior alterations to an apartment building ("Ermineskin Place"; replacing handrail on west elevation of Block C).
Mobile home renovated for barrier free access - new ramp, enlarge exterior doors, renovate bathroom and kitchen (existing without permits).
To construct exterior alterations to existing garage ceiling repairs and hand railings. (Green Manor Gardens Buildings 2901, 2911, 2927, 2937, 2947)
To construct exterior alterations (ground level deck 4.57m x 4.27m with wheelchair lift and stairs, DECK 1 3.05m x 3.66m, DECK 2 3.66m x 4.88m, and DECK 3 3.05m x 5.49m) to a mobile  home.
To construct exterior alterations (Uncovered Deck 2.44m x 12.19m @ 1.07m Ht w/ Wheelchair Ramp) to a Mobile Home.
To construct a front uncovered deck (2.44m x 2.44m @ 0.8m in Height) and ramp access to main floor (0.91m x 7.32m).

To construct Interior Alterations (concrete repair and waterproofing at  elevator pits. Elevator 1&2, 3&4, 5 and Elevator 6) located in the parkade of a 4 storey residential apartment building. Wellington Court 2025 Parking Structure Repair Program.

To construct a side uncovered deck with wheelchair ramp (Deck - 3.05m x 13.41m @ 1.07m height in place of previously approved side uncovered decks - 1.22m x 1.83m and 3.048m x 6.096m, Wheelchair Ramp is 1.52m x 9.14m) exisitng without permits.
To construct a front uncovered deck (wheelchair ramp - 8.07m x 0.9m at 0.79m height, with 1.21m x 1.21m bottom landing, and 1.28m x 0.91m ramp to grade)
To demolish an existing ramp (unsafe condition) see report in docs.

To construct an addition, an amenity/administration building and exterior alterations to existing Apartment Building. A connecting building between Building A and B. 4 storey elevator, lobby, amenity & storage.
To construct Telus Mobility Rooftop Cellular antennas on an apartment building
To Construct interior alterations - upgrade handrails in exit stairwells of 9 Apartment Bldgs as per Health Board directive.
To construct Exterior Alterations (balcony maintenance on floors 3 to 14 & ramp maintenance) of an existing apartment building - " Sir William Place."
